mapper.sql: select ct.id, ct.user_id, ct.topic_type, ct.content,ct.address, ct.location,ct.latitude,ct.longitude, ct.create_time,ct.open_type from chat_topic ct
mapper.select:
SELECT ct.id topic_id, ct.user_id, ct.topic_type, ct.content, ct.location, ct.create_time, ct.latitude, ct.longitude, ct.address, ct.open_type ,IF(tf.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR tf.remark_nick_name = '', tu.nick_name, tf.remark_nick_name) AS display_name ,IF(tf.remark_nick_name IS NULL OR tf.remark_nick_name = '', tu.nick_name, tf.remark_nick_name) as nick_name ,tu.head_image_thumb AS portrait FROM chat_topic ct LEFT JOIN im_user tu ON ct.user_id = tu.id LEFT JOIN im_friend tf ON ct.user_id = tf.user_id and tf.friend_id = #{userId} AND tf.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN chat_topic_white ctw ON ct.id = ctw.topic_id AND ctw.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN chat_topic_black ctb ON ct.id = ctb.topic_id AND ctb.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN chat_view_scope cv ON ct.user_id = cv.user_id AND cv.is_friend = 1 LEFT JOIN chat_see_permission csp ON ct.user_id = csp.target_id AND csp.permission_type = 2 AND csp.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN chat_see_permission csp1 ON ct.user_id = csp1.user_id AND csp1.permission_type = 1 AND csp1.target_id = #{userId} WHERE ct.user_id = #{userId} OR (((ct.open_type = 1 ) OR (ct.open_type = 2 AND ct.user_id = #{userId}) OR (ct.open_type = 3 AND ctw.id IS NOT NULL) OR (ct.open_type = 4 AND ctb.id IS NULL)) AND ( cv.view_type is null or cv.view_type = 0 OR (cv.view_type = 1 AND ct.user_id = #{userId}) OR (cv.view_type = 2 AND ct.create_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 3 DAY) OR (cv.view_type = 3 AND ct.create_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) AND csp.target_id IS NULL AND csp1.target_id IS NULL
) AND tf.id IS NOT NULL order by ct.create_time desc limit #{page}, #{pageSize};
